quality.utility_clear: High utility for gathering ambient information and minor questing.
quality.balance_assessment: Appropriate for a 1st-level spell; the limitations on intelligence temper its power.

mechanics.spell_effect_summary: Allows verbal communication and basic intelligence gathering from beasts for 10 minutes.

recommendations.data_enrichment: No enrichment needed for core data.
recommendations.mechanical_notes: The GM discretion clause for favors is important and correctly noted.
